notes: Arma 3 stock aluminum armor material. Engine coeff ~0.5x vs Default. Used for light vehicle hulls (HMMWV, truck cabs) in CfgVehicleHitPoints. Represents the game's abstract 'aluminum' armor class, roughly corresponding to 5083/7039 series armor aluminum.

source.reference: ARMA 3 game engine configuration, BI config reference
source.methodology: RHAe=0.5 is the ARMA 3 game engine value for its 'aluminum' armor class, consistent with 5083/7039 aluminum RHAe range of 0.35-0.50. Density per 5083 specification.
